# procd module
> Defines the procd init script Bash API for service registration and supervised process lifecycle control.
> **Total Context:** ~352 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for procd that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~188 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for procd when a larger context window is available. (~429 tokens, l4-monolith)
